flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Middle Tennessee State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $31.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Middle Tennessee State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.2k → $10.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Middle Tennessee State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Middle Tennessee State University fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($22.5k → $20.0k).
